item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately brakes the requested next manual gate, explicitly identifies the repeated pattern of adding human checks after prior downstream failures, and reframes the issue as recurring entry data quality/system constraint failure. It allows only a temporary emergency check with a removal condition, then proposes upstream structural fixes such as system validation, field constraints, auto-fill, duplicate blocking, and stopping further manual role stacking."}
